query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "function-aware fill-in-the-middle as mid-training for coding agent fou" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (Fill-in-the-Middle pretraining for code LLMs) and domain (code editing and generation) as the user's question, offering a canonical alternative approach (AST-based masking) to the standard random-character FIM mentioned in the user's context. It provides essential prior work on the specific training strategy and evaluation benchmarks relevant to extending the user's research on coding agents.
